title: Classic PVP x16
description: Custom sky, Tools, and a lot more for PVP
body:
# What is That?

This resource pack is designed specifically for PvP players who want a clean, clear, and competitive visual style.

It features a bright blue sky to give better visibility and a smoother in-game experience. All tools have custom textures, redesigned to look sharper and more suitable for fast-paced PvP combat.

The wood planks textures are completely reworked, giving them a fresh and unique look while keeping them simple and easy on the eyes.
Armor sets come with a clear outline, making players more visible during fights and helping you react faster in intense PvP situations.

Overall, this pack focuses on clarity, performance, and PvP advantage, without losing the classic Minecraft feel.

## Perfect for:
- PvP & Duels
- BedWars / SkyWars
- Competitive Minecraft players

## Note

to make the sky work you need 2 mods for [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) 

- [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify)
- [CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada)

or [optifine](https://optifine.net/home) if you using [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)
